_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your details.
_notes: loop_interval_minutes: how often to sync in --loop mode.
After the first tick the agent tracks exact last-sync time and only
queries ESSL for NEW swipes, so a short interval costs almost nothing.
window_minutes: only used on the FIRST tick to seed the initial lookback.
sync_days: used in one-shot --days mode only.
RECOMMENDED: Run continuously with:  node sync.js --loop
Syncs every 30 seconds automatically — punch appears in ERP within ~30s.
Get your api_key from the ERP: HR & Admin → ESSL Sync → Agent Setup tab.
